Ability: Growing Up
Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to your Active Pokémon. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.

products.title: Banette GX Full Art - 157/168 - Celestial Storm - Holo
products.body_html:
Ability: Shady Move
Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may move 1 damage counter from 1 Pokémon to another Pokémon.

[P] Shadow Chant: 30+
This attack does 10 more damage for each Supporter card in your discard pile. You can’t add more than 100 damage in this way.

Once during your turn (before your attack), if this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, you may move 1 damage counter from 1 Pokémon to another Pokémon.

[P] Shadow Chant: 30+
This attack does 10 more damage for each Supporter card in your discard pile. You can’t add more than 100 damage in this way.

[P] Tomb Hunt-GX
